statement.p: Since the year 2010, the percent of wealth in the United States that is held by the wealthiest 1% has followed the formula p=0.34(n-2010)+28.3 where n is the year. If you want to know when the top 1% held 31.02% of the wealth, you have the equation {31.02}={0.34\mathopen{}\left(n-2010\right)+28.3}\text{.} Does this happen in the year 2018\text{?}
